eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Randall, TX; at 05:25 PM ON MAY 14, 2026 Effective until 06:25 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: Evacuate due to wildfire. This order is not effective immediately. Follow directions from emergency personnel. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Stay informed via local news or official channels. Go to Cole Community Center
